title: Teivio 5 Liter Small Bin Bags 80 Counts Pedal Bin Liners Thick Plastic Waste Bags for Bathroom, Kitchen, Office, Fit 3,5,6L Rubbish Bin, Clear
features: STRONG & DURABLE: Our small bin bags are made of HDPE material, this kind of material can make the garbage bags stronger, with moderate tear resistance, durability, leak proof and odor control.
BREAKPOINT DESIGN: Easy to tear the bag off at the perforation. The break-point design can avoid breaking the next trash bin liner.
LEAK-PROOF DESIGN: These small wastebasket bags are designed with a sealed star bottom, stretchy and anti-puncture, strong to hold wet food scraps and heavy trash without tearing or leaking.
SIZE FOR SMALL TRASH CAN: Our pedal bin bag are perfect in size, suitable for most small household garbage cans, helping to reduce the unpleasant odor and keep the home bins fresh.

MULTIPURPOSE: The garbage bags are came in a multi rolls, you can distributed the rolls between several rooms (likes bathroom, bedroom, living room, dining room, office) to always have some on hand when taking out trash or cleaning pet's litter and baby diapers.
description: FOR 3-5Liter TRASH CAN: The size of the garbage bag is 16.3" W x 16.9" L, which is more suitable for the 3-5l trash bin, small trash can for home office kitchen bathroom bedroom. AVAILABLE SMALL TRASH BIN: Height ≤ 13" Circumference ≤ 32.5" LEAK-PROOF DESIGN: These trash bin liners are designed with a sealed star bottom, strong and sturdy enough to hold wet food scraps and heavy trash without tearing or leaking. CAME IN A MULTI ROLLS: You can distributed the rolls between several rooms to always have some on hand when taking out trash. ODOR CONTROL: Made of HDPE material, this trash bags are unscented, with tough drawstring design, easy to tie and block odors.
